untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg spread analysis across related instruments/delivery months with theoretical pricing relationships, correlation tracking, and bid-ask spread monitoring. The allowed indicator set only supports single-instrument technical analysis. Required capabilities not available: (1) cross-instrument price relationships and theoretical spread calculations, (2) real-time bid-ask spread data, (3) multi-leg correlation computation, (4) inter-month or inter-contract spread deviation measurement. This is a structural limitation, not a parameter tuning issue.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_60_0 describes a calendar/basis spread arbitrage strategy requiring simultaneous monitoring of two correlated contracts. The backtest engine's allowed indicators are designed for single-instrument price action analysis. To implement this signal would require: (a) spread price feeds, (b) theoretical pricing model for the relationship, (c) correlation matrix updates, (d) market microstructure data (bid-ask). None of these can be expressed using the provided indicator set.
